entity.summary: Native Hyperliquid on-chain decentralized exchange and routing aggregator combining v2 and v3 AMM liquidity, swaps, liquidity pools, and cross-environment routing across HyperEVM and HyperCore.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Hypertrade as a native on-chain Hyperliquid DEX with v2 and v3 pool models plus the R1 routing aggregator. Version and registry-source rows are consolidated into one exchange entity.

evidence.title: Hypertrade
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies Hypertrade as a native on-chain DEX and aggregator for Hyperliquid and documents token swaps, liquidity positions, v2/v3 pool models, non-custodial on-chain operation, and cross-environment routing.

evidence.title: Welcome to Hypertrade
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Hypertrade as a native on-chain v2/v3 DEX and aggregator built for Hyperliquid and describes swaps, liquidity-position management, transaction history, and HyperEVM/HyperCore routing.

evidence.title: Hypertrade Pools
evidence.notes: Current first-party pools surface exposes pool creation and pool analytics fields including TVL, volume, fees, APR, liquidity, and current network monitoring.
